leading.example_sentence: She is a leading expert in her field.
leading.original_sentence: More and more leading universities are offering advanced management training programs for senior business executives.

senior.example_sentence: He was promoted to a senior position in the company.
senior.original_sentence: More and more leading universities are offering advanced management training programs for senior business executives.

ready-made.explanation_en: prepared in advance and ready to use immediately
ready-made.example_sentence: There is no ready-made solution to this problem.
ready-made.original_sentence: According to the sponsors, the big benefit of these programs is not that the executives get ready-made formulae that they can use to operate their business more efficiently.

efficiently.explanation_en: doing something well without wasting time or energy
efficiently.example_sentence: The new software helps us work more efficiently.
efficiently.original_sentence: According to the sponsors, the big benefit of these programs is not that the executives get ready-made formulae that they can use to operate their business more efficiently.

bull session.explanation_en: an informal, relaxed conversation or discussion
bull session.example_sentence: We had a long bull session about our future plans.
bull session.original_sentence: Many of these programs require the executives to live together in college dormitories, thus encouraging bull sessions.

boiled down to.explanation_en: summarized or reduced to the most important part
boiled down to.example_sentence: The problem can be boiled down to a lack of money.
boiled down to.original_sentence: Boiled down to one word, the executives benefit most from the stimulation received.

reel off.explanation_en: to say a long list of things quickly and easily
reel off.example_sentence: He reeled off a list of reasons why he couldn't attend.
reel off.original_sentence: He reeled off a number of things, a revision in the compensation plan, sales meetings twice a month instead of once a month, new business cards and stationery, a revision in sales territories, not one of which was specifically recommended in the training program.

canned.explanation_en: not original; prepared in a standard way that lacks creativity
canned.example_sentence: The politician gave a canned speech that sounded very insincere.
canned.original_sentence: The sales manager didn't get a bunch of canned techniques.

beneficial.example_sentence: Eating healthy food is beneficial for your body.
beneficial.original_sentence: Instead, he got something much more valuable, the stimulation to think of ideas directly beneficial to his own particular organization.

venture.explanation_en: a new activity or project that involves risk
venture.example_sentence: They started a new business venture together.
venture.original_sentence: A young accountant for a paint manufacturer told me about a very successful venture of his that was sparked by the ideas of others.

sparked by.example_sentence: The argument was sparked by a simple misunderstanding.
sparked by.original_sentence: A young accountant for a paint manufacturer told me about a very successful venture of his that was sparked by the ideas of others.

casual.example_sentence: I have a casual interest in photography.
casual.original_sentence: I never had had more than a casual interest in real estate, he told me.

stick close to.explanation_en: to stay within the limits of something or not change one's habits
stick close to.example_sentence: He likes to stick close to his routine every day.
stick close to.original_sentence: I've been a professional accountant for several years now, and I've stuck pretty close to my profession.

metropolitan.explanation_en: relating to a large city and its surrounding area
metropolitan.example_sentence: The metropolitan area is home to millions of people.
metropolitan.original_sentence: He predicted that the metropolitan area would continue to grow far out into the surrounding farmland.

stimulated.explanation_en: encouraged to be active or interested
stimulated.example_sentence: The discussion stimulated my interest in history.
stimulated.original_sentence: This man's talk really stimulated me.
